name: feature.campaign-orchestration.nodes
description: Campaign Studio orchestration node pack (ADR 0158 / ADR 0014) — the post-generation pipeline: `consistency-check` (scores generated channel drafts against the messaging kernel, ≥80 advisory) and `finalize` (creates the MarketingCampaign from a confirmed brief over ctx.features['campaign-orchestration']). Used by the parent orchestration workflow + the Campaign Strategist.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Campaign: Consistency Check
nodes.description: Scores cross-asset messaging consistency — how well each generated channel draft echoes the brief's messaging kernel (≥80 advisory). Inputs: { briefId, drafts? }. Output: { report }.

nodes.label: Campaign: Finalize
nodes.description: Creates (or updates) the MarketingCampaign from a confirmed brief — one campaign per brief — over ctx.features['campaign-orchestration']. Inputs: { briefId }. Output: { campaign }.
